title: $tan
text: $tan Return the tangent of X. $tan ( X ) Parameters X —angle in radians or a field (or indirect reference to a field), a variable, or a function or expression which evaluates to an angle in radians. Return Values Tangent of X If an error occurs , $procerror contains a negative value that identifies the exact error. Table 1. Values of $procerror Commonly Returned Following $tan Value Error constant Meaning -1208 <UPROCERR_OVERFLOW> Overflow. Use Allowed in all component types. Example: Using $tan The following example returns the tangent of the given expression: vTangent = $tan($pi() * RADIANS) Copy Related Links $atan Return the arc tangent of X. Was this topic helpful?
